candidates.why: This row appears within the COGS build-up: for example, in periods where component detail is shown, Cost of goods sold equals Cost of materials + Personnel expenses + External services + Depreciation and amortization + Cost of goods sold - Balancing value. That indicates the depreciation/amortization is already embedded in the selected COGS rows rather than a separate same-level add-on.
This label refers to SGA, not COGS, and it is blank in the excerpt. It is not relevant for COGS_DA.

variables.notes: No separate COGS D&A row should be added. The visible 'Depreciation and amortization' line is a component of the selected COGS bucket and would double count if added separately.

candidates.why: This is the only row explicitly tied to SGA, but it has no visible values and appears as a blank/subordinate placeholder rather than a populated separate operating expense line to add.
Although populated, this row sits in the COGS section above gross profit and reconciles into Cost of goods sold, so it should not be added to XSGA.

variables.notes: No separate SG&A D&A row should be added. The explicit SGA D&A row is blank, and the populated depreciation/amortization row belongs to COGS, not SG&A.
